case_title: YICK WONG O. VS. MEGAN WILSON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO SERVICE. COMMISSIONER SLAVIT; CLERK: F. RAYRAY. NOT REPORTED (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-17-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, MEGAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, YICK O. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILSON, MEGAN MINE, AYANO $746.78 PRINCIPAL, $73.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $820.28, DEFENDANT FAILED TO PROVIDE SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO JUSTIFY DEDUCTION OF 40% OF UTILITY BILL. BOTH DEFENDANTS JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY LIABLE FOR PAYMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
